zh.lifeSummary: 當Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr於1647年4月1日出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥時，他的父親Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle56歲，母親Dame, Anna Elphinstone20歲。他於1672年12月26日與Lady Margaret Burnet在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1711年4月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州南蒙德享年64歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州南蒙德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr于1647年4月1日出生在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥时，他的父亲Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle56岁，母亲Dame, Anna Elphinstone20岁。他于1672年12月26日与Lady Margaret Burnet在英国苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1711年4月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州南蒙德享年64岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州南蒙德。

nameMeanings.name: Lockhart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: nickname from Old French locart, a Normanno-Picard form of Old French lo(s)chart ‘one who squints, who is cross-eyed’, attested in 13th- and 14th-century Arras (Pas-de-Calais) as Louchard, Lochard, Locard and Locart. It is a derivative of Latin luscus ‘one-eyed’. In France Locard is mostly found in Normandy (especially Calvados) c. 1900, while Louchart is mainly concentrated in Pas-de-Calais at the same time.

History: According to family tradition, Sir Simon Locard held the key to the locked silver casket in which Robert the Bruce's heart was taken to be buried in the Holy Land in 1329. This unverifiable story is no doubt related to the later spelling of the Scottish surname as Lockhart and to the addition of a heart and fetterlock to the family coat of arms (date unknown).

variants.name: Lockard
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Lockhart   1 and 2.

variants.name: Lockart
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Lockhart  .

variants.name: Luckhardt
meanings: German: from the ancient Germanic female personal name Liutgard, a compound of liud ‘people, tribe’ + gard ‘protective enclosure, yard’. Liutgard was a popular name in medieval times; among others it was the name of the daughter of emperor Otto I and the wife of Charlemagne.

variants.name: Lochard
meanings: French: from a derivative of Old French loche ‘loach’, later also ‘species of giant slug’, hence, in the latter case, a nickname for a slow man. This surname is also found in Haiti.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: Horatio
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Horace , influenced by the Latin form Horatius and the Italian form Orazio. It is chiefly known as having been borne by Admiral Horatio Nelson ( 1758–1805 ), victor of many sea battles with the French during the Napoleonic Wars, culminating in the Battle of Trafalgar, in which he was killed.

en.lifeSummary: When Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr was born on 1 April 1647, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle, was 56 and his mother, Dame, Anna Elphinstone, was 20. He married Lady Margaret Burnet on 26 December 1672, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 28 April 1711, in Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 64, and was buried in Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr est né le 1 avril 1647, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Dame, Anna Elphinstone, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Burnet le 26 décembre 1672, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 28 avril 1711, à Nansemond, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Nansemond, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr am 1. April 1647 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle 56 und seine Mutter Dame, Anna Elphinstone 20. Er hat am 26. Dezember 1672 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Burnet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 28. April 1711 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr è nato il il 1 aprile 1647 nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Dame, Anna Elphinstone, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Burnet il 26 dicembre 1672, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 28 aprile 1711, nel Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Capt James Horatio Lockhart Srが1647年4月1日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castleは56歳，母Dame, Anna Elphinstoneは20歳であった。1672年12月26日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグでLady Margaret Burnetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1711年4月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ナンセモンドで64歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ナンセモンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial Am: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 난젬드
ko.lifeSummary: Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr(이)가 1647년 4월 1일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame, Anna Elphinstone(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1672년 12월 26일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 Lady Margaret Burnet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1711년 4월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 난젬드에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 난젬드에 묻혔다.

pt.1 April 1647–28 April 1711: 1 de abril de 1647–28 de abril de 1711
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr nasceu em 1 de abril de 1647, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Dame, Anna Elphinstone, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Burnet em 26 de dezembro de 1672, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 28 de abril de 1711, em Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr родился 1 апреля 1647 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame, Anna Elphinstone, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Burnet 26 декабря 1672 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 28 апреля 1711 г. в местности нансемонд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности нансемонд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.1 April 1647–28 April 1711: 1 de abril de 1647–28 de abril de 1711
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr nació el 1 de abril de 1647, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Dame, Anna Elphinstone, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Burnet el 26 de diciembre de 1672, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 28 de abril de 1711, en Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial America.
